# ConflictResolutionModal

ConflictResolutionModal Shows when local file and Git repository have diverged, allowing user to choose which version to keep.

## Location
`src/components/modals/ConflictResolutionModal.jsx`

## Props

This component does not accept props.

- `user`
- `useEnter`
- `useLeave`

## Dependencies

- `lucide-react`
